reviews.title: Nice mouth feel too
reviews.text: These are sturdy enough to get debris out and still just long enough to work around appliances.  Doesn't hurt my gums, actually, feels good to brush

reviews.title: Works Great On Braces, My Kids Like Them, Brush Cover
reviews.text:
I got this Ortho Standard 33 orthodontic toothbrush almost two months ago and decided to get this value pack. My kids have trouble properly cleaning around their brackets, and since using these it’s been better. I don’t notice food stuck or buildup on their brackets.

I can’t speak from personal experience using them because I don’t have braces but my kids like them. They said that they’re soft and help to clean their teeth better with having braces. They also mentioned that it’s comfortable to hold.

I like the clear design but would prefer colored bristles or handles to easily identify household toothbrushes.

The cover for the toothbrush head is great to have!

I’d say that they work as described and worth giving a try to help brush teeth better while having braces.

reviews.title: My Kids Like It, The Brush Head Cover is A Bonus
reviews.text:
I got the Ortho Standard 33 for my kids because they have trouble properly cleaning around their brackets, I was hoping these would help due to the design of them.

I can’t speak from personal experience using them because I don’t have braces but my kids like them. They said that they’re soft and help to clean their teeth better with having braces. They also mentioned that it’s comfortable to hold.

I like the clear design but would prefer colored bristles to easily identify household toothbrushes.

The cover for the toothbrush head is great to have!

I’d say that they work as described and worth giving a try to help better brush teeth while having braces.

reviews.title: It works great
reviews.text: This toothbrush works great to clean around those brackets!

reviews.title: Good design for brushing with braces
reviews.text: I got these for my young adult son who wears braces, and he is very pleased with them. The size of the brush is just right for maneuvering around teeth and braces. The bristles are angled which makes it helpful to thoroughly remove food and tartar for someone with braces. I like that there is a pack of 6, so that there is always a new toothbrush available when the current one needs to be replaced.

title: GUM Crayola Twistables Kids Toothbrush with Fun Twisting Head, Soft Bristles, Ages 3+ (Pack of 4) -230TT
description:
Product Description
Getting your kids excited about their daily tooth brushing routine requires more than just an ordinary kids toothbrush. Give them the fun and functional GUM Crayola Twistables Toothbrush for kids. It’s one of the best toothbrushes to keep kids engaged with bright and colorful handles, as well as a twistable head that can be extended from the toothbrush handle with a twist of the bottom green knob. When not in use, kids can twist the toothbrush back and store upside down in the included toothbrush cap. The cap doubles as a stand to keep the brush from rolling off the bathroom sink. This toothbrush also comes with soft, antibacterial bristles to further inhibit germ growth. The toothpaste sweet spot is highlighted by the colored bristles in the center of the compact head to teach children how much toothpaste they should be using. If you want to equip your little ones with a kids' toothbrush that will get them enthusiastic about their twice-daily tooth brushing routine, the GUM Crayola Twistable Toothbrush is what you need.
Manufacturer Contact Information
1-888-777-3116
features: EXTENDABLE TOOTHBRUSH HEAD: Twist the green knob on the handle to extend the compact toothbrush head for a fun and functional cleaning experience

KIDS TOOTHBRUSH CAP & STAND: Convenient antibacterial cap and stand to keep the brush from rolling off the sink. When it’s time to travel, pop the cap on top to cover the brush – perfect for road trips, camping, and sleepovers
CLINICALLY PROVEN BRISTLES: GUM Dome Trim brushes feature a raised center bristle design that provides greater contact with the tooth surface, while also reaching under the gum line
TOOTHPASTE SWEET SPOT: The compact head features colored centered soft bristles that teach children where to place their toothpaste and how much paste is needed
THE GUM MISSION: We are committed to helping people of all ages have stronger, healthier teeth, and gums by providing high quality, innovative oral care products that promote optimal dental health

reviews.title: Meh its ok
reviews.text: Its just a cheap what you would get for free at the kids dentist office kind of brush. Its totally flat but thats not a huge deal for me. The brush twisting gets my kids more into brushing their teeth but when I am brushing, the brush itself doesn't lock into place as as you are going around in their mouth and moving your hand it twists and doesn't stay in place. So I am typically adjusting at least once mid brush. Usually my kiddos are good about brushing but they have their days so its those days its really an issue for me. For the price it isn't worth it for me.

reviews.title: Great product! Decent price!
reviews.text: (Picture only shows three but there were four) adorable colors and tons of fun for my four year old. I thought they twisted all the way down but actually the head stays out then u use the stand as a cover which is what I needed since hes always knocking stuff off the bathroom sink. Will recommend to friends and family, and buy again in the future, really great product!

reviews.title: Great value for the money sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Great adult sonic toothbrush for a nice value. One thing to note is this vibrates rather than spins. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. Regardless, I enjoy using it. It comes with 6 replacement heads for a 18 month supply, which is pretty impressive. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. 60+ day charge. Nice black color. Easy to use & charge. Great value for the money.

Amazon will donate to your favorite charity! Use Amazon Smile (smile.amazon.com) when you order and Amazon will donate to the charity of your choice when you make a qualifying purchase. Check out how Amazon Smile works at https://smile.amazon.com/gp/chpf/about/ref=smi_se_rspo_laas_aas. My shopping is donating to my charity of choice; Unravel, at no cost to me! Unravel is a nonprofit organization working to spread knowledge about the grim realities of pediatric cancer and the devastating impact from the lack of funding. All monies raised by and for Unravel will go directly to the fight against pediatric cancer.

reviews.title: Attractive yellow color!
reviews.text: First of all, I love this bright yellow colored electric toothbrush! A refreshing change from the regular black and  white sonic electric toothbrushes that are on the market right now! The bristles are ordinary but the extra brush heads make up for it. The price is just the same like the regular sonic brushes right now so it is worth a try!

reviews.title: Strong Vibration
reviews.text: Works well with strong vibration. Timer works well with 30 seconds intervals. Brushes well with soft bristles. The only thing that I personally don't like is the slippery handle. Otherwise it is a good product. Shipping was fast.

reviews.title: The Yellow is Very Cheerful
reviews.text: This is a nice electric toothbrush for the price. It has multiple settings (clean, soft, polish, massage, and white), although I tend to leave it on white most of the time. The sunny yellow color is really quite cheerful and is a bright start to the day. The bristles are softer than others I've used, which is nice for those of us who tend to brush too hard. I really like that the brush head (and even the bristles) match the body... all in the same sunny yellow. I'm also impressed that it came with so many replacement brush heads, each with their own cover. I won't need to buy replacements for a long time! I'm pretty impressed overall.

reviews.title: Really Like It!
reviews.text: This toothbrush is sleek and powerful and I really like all of the different settings. It has a good battery life - I have only had to charge it twice so far.

Second, these aren’t put sealed packaging, there are just shoved in a box and who knows what material they’re made out of? Made in fancy China… no offense to China, I really like them, they just have a bad reputation for cheaply made products that have harmful chemicals in them.

Sorry but this is a hard NO for me and a return.

Schallcare brush heads, the bristles with bacterial protective function, which can prevent bacterial growth on the brush. Also with strong cleaning function, which can removes up to 3x more plaque along the gum line than a traditional manual toothbrush.

reviews.title: Good, but take a bit to soften
reviews.text: The first time I used these they made my gums bleed. It takes a bit for the bristles to soften up. The bristles also tend to look a bit frayed after a few weeks which definitely doesn’t happen with the name brand ones.

reviews.title: Every bit as good as the ones made by Oral-B
reviews.text:
I've been using Oral-B electric toothbrushes for 15-20 years and have always purchased replacement brushes made by them. This time I decided to see if I could save some money and give these a try, and I'm very glad that I did.

The only difference I can see between the Schallcare ones and the ones sold under the Oral-B Sensitive Care label is that these fit tighter, which results in a surprisingly large reduction in the noise level, and of course they only cost 1/3 as much. I've been using one the Schallcare brushes for about 6 weeks now and it shows absolutely no wear, so I think there's a good chance they will last every bit as long as the Oral-B brand ones.

reviews.title: Great Electric Toothbrush
reviews.text: Very happy with this Sonic electric toothbrush. I like all the different speeds. Very simple and quick to charge and would be easy to travel with and charge. Nice snap cover for the brush making it easier to pack the brush for travel.  Timer mode works great encouraging me not to be in such a hurry brushing my teeth.

reviews.title: Lightweight brush that packs a punch
reviews.text:
What I like:

-lightweight and compact in size
-only one button to cycle through modes and turn it off
-comes with (3) brush heads
-includes USB power cord
-will fit in my toothbrush holder

What I don't like:

-need to buy power adapter to charge it

This isn't a fancy sonic toothbrush. If you're looking for a basic electric toothbrush that's a step above the type you'd buy at the grocery store (that takes two AA batteries - you know the one), this will do it. The toothbrush cleaned my teeth well with a good amount of vibration of the bristles. I'm pretty pleased.

reviews.title: Toothbrush
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:fa007684a8fa5379afdcdb30ceda64f4]] At first I couldn’t get over the vibration, but after using it a couple times I couldn’t get over how polished & white my teeth were! This toothbrush has become top tier in my dental hygiene. 10/10

Love these toothbrush covers! The pastel colors are appealing and smooth feeling. Fits great over my electric toothbrush. A little expensive, but they’ve been worth it!

Will be buying more for replacements in the future.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Perfect for any size tooth brush we own.

reviews.title: I prefer the flip top ones after trying these; these sometimes fly out of my fingers
reviews.text:
There are six claw-type toothbrush holders in this package. The colors are muted but nice. However, after trying these, I prefer the flip top holders better because they are more streamlined, have an air vent for drying the brush, and are easier to operate.

These look nice on the brush but there is no air vent. The only air circulation is through the bottom hole through which the handle feeds through. Also, the act of opening the clip is cumbersome. Sometimes these almost want to fly out of my hand. In addition, they flop around on the top of the brush and take up more space. For instance, if I had a six-toothbrush holder and wanted to cover the top of every brush, I really could not do that successfully with these because they are top large and would be hitting into each other.

Nevertheless, these do what they are supposed to do except they are not my favorite.

The current price of $17.99 is an expensive $3 per holder.

reviews.title: Expensive for what they are, but handy and easy to use
reviews.text:
I've bought travel clips like these in the past that were similar to these. They're pretty much tiny enclosed hair clips that go over your toothbrush. These are more compact than others I've used so they're pretty secure on the toothbrush and don't move around in my toiletries bag. They may dent your brush's bristles of you have a larger brush.

There isn't much to these, they are sturdy and cute, but I do think they're pretty pricy for what they are. Granted, you do get 6 in the pack and would likely not have to repurchase them if you don't lose them.

reviews.title: Fit our electric toothbrush heads well
reviews.text: Just what they say they are. They fit our electric toothbrush heads perfectly. Easy to open and close.

reviews.title: Cute but a bit smaller than expected
reviews.text: This 3 pack baby toothbrushes are good and soft. They’re easy to hold and grab for kids. However,  they appear a bit smaller in person than the picture. Which is why they can’t get to all the areas of the mouth properly. They make good teething tool and starter toothbrushes for kids close to 12 months or so.

reviews.title: They are handy
reviews.text: These are really cute and logical. My toddler won't use them( we been having trouble getting him to let me brush his teeth) I'm going to try them on my other baby when his mouth is bigger

reviews.title: I am one of those people that can't stand the ...
reviews.text: I am one of those people that can't stand the feel of soft bristled toothbrushes.  I am therefore stuck looking all over to find one of the medium bristled ones.  I have finally found one that feels right and leaves my teeth feeling clean without making my gums bleed.

reviews.title: Clean away
reviews.text: brushes my teeth every day. deserves 5*

reviews.title: Good delivery but poore choice by the packager
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. I often use this brand and style it holds up very well, however I did not like the fact that they sent a guy a pink toothbrush.

reviews.title: Very good travel toothbrush when your sonic is at home.
reviews.text: or when the rest of the family is asleep and you don't want the noisy electric brush to wake them up. The thick handle and light weight is ideal for the elderly or those with arthritis making a tight grip harder to do. I like the medium brush better than the soft bristle, with the medium you don't have to brush as hard for clean teeth and as long as you aren't grinding the bristles into your mouth your gums should not become stressed. With the soft bristle, while ideal for gums, my teeth don't feel as clean.

reviews.title: Polishing star takes some getting used to
reviews.text:
I'm not sure the polishing star is really more effective than normal bristles if you do a good job of brushinganyway, and it is a but squeaky on my teeth and can rub the gums the wrong way if you are careless in brushing.

That said, the medium bristles are effective and not too hard, and I did like the head size, handle grip and overall effectiveness.

title: Solodent Toothbrush Ultra Soft, Silver & Gold for Sensitive Teeth and Gums (Pack of 1) Colors May Vary
description: Enjoy the unprecedented, professional-like, cleaning experience of all-in-one Multi-Action Solodent SILVER SERIES Toothbrushes. Flossing Slim Ultra Soft Bristles gently clean hard to reach areas, between the teeth, under the gum line, and save tooth enamel from abrasion. They softly stimulate sensitive gums without bleeding or pain. Extra Soft Bristles make this toothbrush perfect for those with gum recession, sensitive teeth, exposed roots, implants and braces. Silver infused embossed PBT bristles naturally fight and minimize bacterial growth on bristles and keep them clean between uses. Innovative Patented 3D Embossed PBT Bristles are designed to gently and effectively remove maximum plaque due to multitouch contacts to tooth surfaces. Actual Gold infused bristles. PBT (polybutylene terephthalate) bristles are more durable and less water-absorbent than traditional nylon bristles and outlast them by 50%. Beautiful patent pending diamond pattern design and ergonomic handle. Designed by a dentist. Made in South Korea.

title: Oral-B 8000 Electric Toothbrush with Bluetooth Connectivity, White
description: Use the Oral-B App to seamlessly pair your Genius 8000 with a smartphone and you're on your way to brushing like your dentist recommends. The Oral-B Genius 8000 comes with Position Detection technology which uses Bluetooth technology, your smartphone, and facial recognition technology to provide you with real-time feedback about your brushing habits. The 360 Smarting with LED lights allows you to personalize your brushing experience with your choice of 12 colors. The Smarting works with the integrated timer and pressure sensor to provide you with visual feedback on brushing time and brushing pressure. Together, they help you ensure you brush for the recommended 2-minutes while making sure you brush with appropriate pressure to protect your gums from over-brushing. The premium Smart Travel Case lets you charge your brush and smartphone (via USB) at the same time while using only one wall plug. The Genius features 6 brushing modes so you can further customize your brushing experience based on your specific oral care goals. This highly advanced brush features a dentist-inspired round head that surrounds and cups each tooth with dynamic oscillating, rotating and pulsating movements to remove up to 500% more plaque than a regular manual toothbrush. Trust in the precision engineering of Braun and the dental expertise of Oral-B, the #1 brand used and recommended by dentists worldwide. 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed.
features: Position Detection to help you know where you've brushed, so you never miss a zone
Multicolor Smarting on electric toothbrush provides coaching on brushing time

Smart Travel toothbrush case for dual cell phone and brush handle charging

reviews.title: Tb
reviews.text: Stop working after two months. What a waste.

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.text:
for a top model priced as such, i was a disappointed in the feature set....no UV system to sterilize the brush head. Travel pack and main stand run on two different power systems...travel pack runs on 100-240v (universal) and main stand only runs on 110v (NA).

Does anyone know the point of the tongue mode being at the very bottom of the mode switch list? i brush my teeth and brush my tongue so the tongue mode should have been immediately after the regular brush mode

a few days use on a single charge. great build. grippy soft handle.

reviews.title: Some new features, brush works well.
reviews.text: This toothbrush is much like my old one, only this one is black. It does have a blue tooth thing that is so-so. It was a little cumbersome to get the app to work, (and had to get a new phone). The interaction between myself, the tooth brush, and the phone seems to be lacking. I envisioned real time brushing animation or something. This just times you through the selected areas. It is nice to get the bushing too hard feature well to know its there, and works. I miss the second speed my old one had this one only has one speed. I like that I can use my phone to help to remind me of my brushing responsibilities. The travel case is a nice feature as well. The design and function of this brush works well as does my old one. I was just expecting something a little more.

reviews.title: Very Good
reviews.text: Product arrived in time and exactly as presented on amazon

reviews.title: powerful toothbrush but a bit gimmicky
reviews.text:
I upgraded to this toothbrush from a vibrating-head type. The difference in cleaning-power feels dramatic. It has several different speeds for brushing teeth, gums, tongue, etc. By default, the light will blink and the toothbrush pause at certain intervals to ensure you spend enough time brushing different areas. This can be further customized with the Bluetooth unit and application. This is a neat novelty, and may be good for encouraging children to learn to brush correctly. To be honest though, when in a rush in the morning, I am not likely to take the extra step of using a phone app while brushing my teeth, and I also prefer not to take up another plug, as it’s not integrated with the charging base.

Overall I like the toothbrush a lot, but next time around, I would likely get the less expensive model without the phone accessories.

title: Colgate 360 Toothbrush with Tongue Cleaner Soft Full Head (Pack of 8)

reviews.title: Okay

reviews.title: Great toothbrushes!
reviews.text: I buy these in a multipack because I'm bad at replacing my toothbrushes if I have to buy them every time. Great toothbrushes. Bristles are medium firm and the circular silicon parts are very good for giving you a clean feeling. The back of head of the toothbrush is textured to use against your tongue, even though I usually don't use it that way.

reviews.title: Great Product at a Great Price
reviews.text: I have always felt that this is the greatest toothbrush ever made, and they have unfortunately become very difficult to find at my local stores.  I have never seen these value packs at any store.  This is the only way to go.  These brushes have wide, soft heads.  The handle is very ergonomically designed and fits very nicely in your hand.  Just buy them.  You won't regret it.

reviews.title: Noisy
reviews.text: This toothbrush is fine. It cleans teeth well and is a reasonable price. It comes with 4 toothbrush heads (2 are in the little box with the charger). It charges via USB and has to be laid on its side to charge, which is a bit of a bummer especially considering there is no cover for the toothbrush heads. It doesn't arrive charged. It charges in a couple of hours. It's noisier than other electric toothbrushes we've used. You hear a constant beeping while you brush. Overall, it's okay, but I would recommend a different product if price isn't an issue.

reviews.title: Five Stars if it suits your needs.
reviews.text:
First of all, the base color was supposed to be black and it is what they call black, but it’s kind of a copper a metallic black not a true black.
The design is compact and it works very well.
I even like the little cord holder that comes with it as it’s very ergonomically designed.
The unit works just fine for my sonicare by Phillips.
I happen to have the one with a glass. After using this a couple of days I realized I like the look of the glass better than I like this.
On the other hand, if you have a very small space in which to put it on your sink, you may prefer something with a smaller silhouette; the footprint is the same, but it’s just not as big a presence because you don’t have the height and width of the glass.

reviews.title: Just as original
reviews.text: I got this to replace mu original charger for electric toothbrush, it looks just like it and so far, it has been working as the original, would recommend.

reviews.title: Great replacement or spare charger for Sonicare
reviews.text:
I really like my Sonic Care toothbrush and take it anywhere. So getting a second charger was a no-brainer.
I chose the gold colored base and it really looks nice.

It works just like the original and comes with the clear plastic holder, but you can also use the glass cup on it if you like. The cable is nice and long and I like that it comes in black, which fits better with some décor. I think there are some choices in regard to color of the base and cable.

Nothing bad to say about them.
perfect for travel or if you have a second home and don't want to constantly take the charger with you; and of course as a replacement.

title: Philips Sonicare Genuine A3 Premium All-in-One Replacement Toothbrush Heads, 2 Brush Heads, White, HX9092/65

Designed to work with all click-on Sonicare models, these brush heads remove up to 20x more plaque than a manual toothbrush while gently improving gum health up to 15x in six weeks (vs. a manual toothbrush). Subscribe & Save on genuine Philips Sonicare brush head replacements and save up to 15%.

reviews.title: Best of the Philips brushes
reviews.text:
I've been using Sonicare for 20 years and I find these A3 heads do the best at cleaning my teeth. The C3 are not too far behind, and the C1 are not far behind those. I just use the old rubbing the tongue on my teeth technique, but with the A3, I seem to go longer before I feel like I need a teeth cleaning at the dentist.
I've also used multiple 3rd party heads and none of them even come close to cleaning like the Philips heads. It's just too bad these things are so expensive, I'll probably stick to the C1 heads unless I see the A3 heads go on sale.

reviews.title: My hygienist noticed a difference!
reviews.text: Used to use the C3s. They are smaller and a bit less comfortable to use than this variant. The main winning point is that my hygienist said "what are you doing differently, your mouth looks way better than usual." I take that as an endorsement, and will continue to use these!

reviews.title: It’s a brush head
reviews.text: It’s a brush head

reviews.title: Works great
reviews.text: These are great toothbrush heads and fit my sonicare perfectly. Cleans teeth well. Would recommend.

reviews.title: Overpriced vs C2
reviews.text: I don’t know what a $15 replacement brush head needs to do to earn 5 stars but this just doesn’t blow me away. I typically buy the C2 replacements, I’ve also used C1 and C3. This is comparable to C3 it’s soft and gives a good clean. I can tell a difference between this and C1 or C2 but when I was using even C1 (which feels harder and I don’t like this one as much C2 is my go to) I didn’t have a cavity and my dentist said I was looking good. I do like that this head tells me when to swap out (C1 doesn’t) but $15 for a replacement is steep considering my toothbrush was $30. I will say after my second root canal I made the switch to a Phillips soniccare and since switching to sonic care from a traditional toothbrush I haven’t had any cavities. So I think using the soniccare with whatever heads you can afford is great for your dental health!

reviews.title: Great for homeless
reviews.text: Love that they are individually wrapped and include toothpaste

reviews.title: Worked out well for our Kits
reviews.text: Each year we put together kits for the unhomed.  These work well as they're individually packaged.  Would definitely buy again.  But would appreciate a discount of some kind to help us provide more kits in the future.

reviews.title: Well made, hygienically packaged, and effective
reviews.text:
These toothbrush kits are great for travel, small clean-up projects, or for house guests. The brush heads are rather large compared to other brushes on the market but they do a good job cleaning. The brush handle is easy to hold and bristles are soft to medium.

I really like that each toothbrush is individually wrapped and include a small tube of toothpaste that taste decent and gets the job done. These are great for the homeless, shelters, bed and breakfasts, etc. I don’t know when this package expires but there is a date on the crimp of the toothpaste that reads “2025 04.” I’ll be sure to donate them well before April 2025 to be on the safe side. Great product, well made, and effective!

title: Sound Feelings Toothbrush - Basic, KIDS, 4-Pack, Extra-Soft
description: Our kids plain toothbrush is perfect for little ones who are just learning to brush their teeth. The bristles are of the same stiffness as our “x-soft” adult model but instead of 47 tufts, they have just 24 tufts. Though we call it our “kids” brush, many adults actually like the control they have with the smaller cleaning surface that this brush provides. 4 toothbrushes per pack. This is NOT a flimsy "disposable" style toothbrush. It is a quality, x-soft-bristle toothbrush with a solid handle like you grew up with. All the bristles are at the same level for the most even cleaning capability. Compare to the older style GUM, Colgate and Just the Basics from CVS brands. No crazy "ergonomic" handles. No multi-color bristles. No varying-length bristles. No bent heads. Just a well-made classic toothbrush! Because the Sound Feelings toothbrush has a traditional flat top, it actually makes better surface contact with all surfaces within your mouth than "modern" multilevel brushes." All toothbrushes are INDIVIDUALLY-WRAPPED in cellophane for maximum sterility. Certified BPA-free, Phthalate-free. Please search on Amazon for ALL VERSIONS of our toothbrushes from Sound Feelings: Soft, Extra Soft, Medium, Hard, Extra-Hard and Kids, or Sampler, if you aren't sure.

title: oogiebear 360° Toothbrush - Training Toothbrush for Babies. Safe Ultra Soft Silicone Toothbrush with Teddy Bear Baby Gum Relief and Gum Massaging Base. Baby Must Haves. BPA Free
features: MAKES BRUSHING SAFE AND BEAR-ABLE - oogiebear’s adorable and innovative baby toothbrush provides better baby oral care and makes brushing tiny teeth fun with a soft bristle brush and bear head design that ensures it never goes in too deep.

FUN AND FUNCTIONAL DESIGN - oogiebear’s unique 360 degree toothbrush effectively cleans teeth and gums with short soft bristles. The soft silicone base is easy for baby to hold while premium grade silicone bumps stimulate gums.

BABY’S FIRST TOOTHBRUSH - Made for babies 3 months and older, oogiebear toothbrush is the perfect tool to get your baby used to brushing before graduating to their first big-kid toothbrush. Its stand-up base makes it easy to clean and store.

SUPERIOR QUALITY - oogiebear toothbrush is made with the highest quality food-grade silicone. Its extra-soft bristles are fun to chew and won’t break off or cause choking while its base has a silky touch that’s soothing to gums.

DOCTOR DESIGNED, MOM TESTED, PERIODONTIST APPROVED - Created by a registered pharmacist and mother and periodontist dad, oogiebear toothbrush is designed to make learning to brush easier for parents and baby for a lifetime of bright beautiful smiles.

reviews.title: Adorable toothbrush and great teether as well but pricey
reviews.text:
This toothbrush/teether is BPA free and made of soft silicone. The head of the cute bear prevents the toothbrush piece from going too far into the baby's mouth but it is still long enough to act as a teether and also massage the gums. Babies usually do not start getting teeth until about 6 months so it can help the child get used to the first steps of "brushing their teeth." The current price of $12.99 ($15.99 minus $3) is a bit pricey for this.

Always supervise during use and be careful to clean this regularly. Because the brush area is grooved, it is important to give this a vigorous cleaning in that area as food, lint, etc. can get caught in that area depending on where the baby puts it.

reviews.title: Convenient, choke-proof baby toothbrush and teether
reviews.text: The whole thing is designed so that baby can't choke on it no matter which part she puts in her mouth.  The whole 'handle' is bendy silicone, which she also likes as a teether.  The wide bear head makes it easy for her to grab and hold onto it.  The brush is on all sides that you don't have to keep turning it around to get both upper and lower teeth, and still goes in enough to brush her tongue and gums.  It's all about the convenience.

reviews.title: Baby toothbrush
reviews.text: Baby now has two adorable teeth and we just started using this toothbrush before bed every night. Not sure how this is supposed to work because we don’t use toothpaste but he laughs and laughs so we love using it. It’s such a cute part of his bedtime routine and as he gets older he will hopefully have a great association with brushing his teeth and dental hygiene because of this

reviews.title: It was a gift
reviews.text: It was a gift to my nieces son. She said he loves it. He’s only 6 months but it’s never too early to teach. She said he won’t let it go.

reviews.title: Well designed kids toothbrush
reviews.text: Very useful toothbrush. I got it for my 8 month old who already has a few teeth. I love the design. It is relatively large, which makes it easier to my baby to hold and shew in. Since the brush is round, it works from all angles. I highly recommend it.
